title: Basket Random
description: A fun, chaotic 2-player basketball game with random physics. Score baskets by jumping and swinging your arms in ever-changing environments!

title: Bloxd.io
description: A Minecraft-inspired multiplayer game with various modes like survival, creative, and parkour. Build, explore, and compete with others in a blocky world.

title: Cookie Clicker
description: The legendary idle game! Bake as many cookies as humanly possible. Hire grandmas, build factories, and reach universal domination through the power of cookies.

title: Quick-Draw
description: The ultimate wild west reaction test. Progress through levels, buy upgrades, and survive the bandit onslaught in this upgraded arcade classic!

title: Retro Bowl
description: The classic 8-bit style American football game. Manage your team, call the plays, and lead your franchise to glory in this addictive sports sim.

title: Pokemon Leaf Green
description: Relive the classic GBA adventure! Capture, train, and battle Pokemon in the Kanto region in this enhanced remake of the original masterpiece.

title: Snow Rider 3D
description: Experience the pure thrill of a high-speed sled ride down a treacherous mountain! Dodge obstacles and collect gifts in this exhilarating 3D winter adventure.

title: Football Bros
description: A fast-paced, action-packed American football game. Dash, pass, and score touchdowns in this exciting sports arcade experience!

title: GunSpin
description: Use a weapon's powerful recoil to propel it through the air! Manage your ammo, buy powerful upgrades, and see how far you can shoot your gun.

title: Slope
description: A fast-paced 3D physics game where you control a ball rolling down a neon slope. Avoid obstacles and stay on the track as it gets faster and more challenging!

title: Minecraft Classic
description: The original web version of Minecraft. Build anything you can imagine with 32 different blocks in this creative sandbox experience.

title: Shell Shockers
description: The world's most popular egg-based multiplayer shooter! Choose your class and blast your way through various maps in this high-octane FPS.

title: Pixel Gun Survival
description: A blocky survival shooter where you fight against waves of zombies and other players in a pixelated world.

title: Getaway Shootout
description: A chaotic two-player physics game where you race to the getaway vehicle. Jump, shoot, and use power-ups to outsmart your opponent!
